assets.assetsDisabledHint: Go to Settings to enable tracking of your owned assets.
assets.eachAssetHint: Each item you own is an asset account. Track its approximate value and actual purchase price.
assets.buyingAsset: buying an asset (actual cost deducted from wallet)
assets.sellingAsset: selling an asset (proceeds added to wallet)

debts.debtsDisabledHint: Go to Settings → Debts to enable tracking of money you lend or borrow.
debts.lendMoney: you lend money (balance goes up, they owe you)
debts.borrowMoney: you borrow or receive repayment (balance goes down)
debts.eachPersonHint: Each person you lend to or borrow from is a

transaction.chooseSendFrom: Please choose which currency slot to send from.
transaction.chooseReceiveInto: Please choose which currency slot to receive into.

newAccount.title: Title*
newAccount.enableMultiAccountMsg: Once enabled, this account cannot be switched back to a regular account.
newAccount.cannotDisableMsg: A multi-account cannot be switched back to a regular account. Delete it and create a new one instead.
newAccount.cannotRemoveMsg: A multi-account must have at least one sub-account.
newAccount.deleteSubAccountMsg: {{currency}} and {{count}} transaction(s) will be permanently deleted.

settings.deleteTransactionsDesc: Deletes all transactions and resets account balances.
settings.deleteEverythingDesc: Deletes all transactions and all accounts. Cannot be undone.

reportBalance.balanceSubtitle: Your total personal accounts balance at the end of each day (in {{symbol}})
reportBalance.totalBalanceHint: Sum of all personal account balances converted to your main currency.
reportBalance.periodChangeHint: How your total balance changed from the start to the end of this period.
reportBalance.includeDebtsHint: When ON, debt accounts appear in the balance chart, total, and account list. This toggle is synced with Edit Debts and Dashboard.
reportBalance.accountBalancesHint:
White number — current balance.
Green/red number — net change during this period (all money in minus all money out).

reportExpense.biggestHint: The expense category where you spent the most money during this period.
reportExpense.biggestTxnHint: Your single largest expense transaction this period, made on {{date}}.
reportExpense.dailyAvgHint: Total expenses divided by the number of days in this period. Shows how much you spend per day on average.
reportExpense.avgTransactionHint: Average size of a single expense transaction. Total expenses divided by number of expense transactions.
reportExpense.peakSpendHint: The single day when you spent the most money. Only counts days that had at least one transaction.
reportExpense.mostFrequentHint: The expense category with the most transactions (not necessarily the highest total amount).
reportExpense.vsPrevPeriodHint: How your expenses changed compared to the previous period. Red (+) means you spent more, green (-) means less.
reportExpense.transactionsHint: Total number of transactions and how many unique days had at least one transaction.

reportIncome.topSourceHint: The income source that brought in the most money during this period.
reportIncome.dailyAvgHint: Total income divided by the number of days in this period.
reportIncome.vsPrevPeriodHint: How your income changed compared to the previous period. Green (+) means you earned more.
reportIncome.savingsRateHint: Percentage of income you kept after expenses. Calculated as (Income - Expenses) / Income * 100.
reportIncome.incomeDaysHint: Number of unique days that had at least one income or expense transaction.

reportOverview.chartSubtitle: Green bars = income, Red bars = expense per sub-period
reportOverview.savingsRateHint: Percentage of income saved after expenses. Calculated as (Income - Expenses) / Income * 100.
reportOverview.avgDailyExpenseHint: Total expenses divided by the number of days in this period.
reportOverview.avgDailyIncomeHint: Total income divided by the number of days in this period.
reportOverview.expenseVsPrevHint: How your total expenses changed compared to the previous period of the same type. Positive means you spent more.
reportOverview.incomeVsPrevHint: How your total income changed compared to the previous period. Positive means you earned more.
reportOverview.bestDayHint: The day with the highest net gain (income minus expenses). Only counts days that had transactions.
reportOverview.worstDayHint: The day with the lowest net result (income minus expenses). Only counts days that had transactions.
reportOverview.netResultHint: Total income minus total expenses for this period. Positive means you saved money.
reportOverview.totalTransactionsHint: Number of income and expense transactions in this period (excludes transfers between personal accounts).

nav.deleteAccountMsg: Are you sure that you want to delete an account with {{count}} transactions?
